**Svitavy District** ([Czech](/wiki/Czech_language "Czech language"): *okres Svitavy*) is a [district](/wiki/Okres "Okres") in the [Pardubice Region](/wiki/Pardubice_Region "Pardubice Region") of the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic"). Its capital is the town of [Svitavy](/wiki/Svitavy "Svitavy").

## Administrative division

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Svitavy_District&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Administrative division")]

Svitavy District is divided into four [administrative districts of municipalities with extended competence](/wiki/Districts_of_the_Czech_Republic#Municipalities_with_extended_competence "Districts of the Czech Republic"): Svitavy, Litomyšl, Moravská Třebová and Polička.

## Geography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Svitavy_District&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Geography")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/35/Poli%C4%8Dka%2C_pohled_z_v%C4%9B%C5%BEe_na_v%C3%BDchod.jpg/250px-Poli%C4%8Dka%2C_pohled_z_v%C4%9B%C5%BEe_na_v%C3%BDchod.jpg)](/wiki/File:Poli%C4%8Dka,_pohled_z_v%C4%9B%C5%BEe_na_v%C3%BDchod.jpg)

[Polička](/wiki/Poli%C4%8Dka "Polička") and surrounding landscape

Svitavy District incorporates parts of historical lands of [Bohemia](/wiki/Bohemia "Bohemia") and [Moravia](/wiki/Moravia "Moravia"). From a total of 116 municipalities, 44 municipalities (including the town of Svitavy) are situated in Moravia, 67 municipalities in Bohemia, and five municipalities ([Brněnec](/wiki/Brn%C4%9Bnec "Brněnec"), [Březová nad Svitavou](/wiki/B%C5%99ezov%C3%A1_nad_Svitavou "Březová nad Svitavou"), [Kamenná Horka](/wiki/Kamenn%C3%A1_Horka "Kamenná Horka"), [Karle](/wiki/Karle_(Svitavy_District) "Karle (Svitavy District)") and [Radiměř](/wiki/Radim%C4%9B%C5%99 "Radiměř")) lie in both lands.

The terrain is undulating to hilly. The territory extends into five geomorphological mesoregions: [Svitavy Uplands](/wiki/Svitavy_Uplands "Svitavy Uplands") (most of the territory), [Upper Svratka Highlands](/wiki/Upper_Svratka_Highlands "Upper Svratka Highlands") (southwest), [Orlické Foothills](/wiki/Orlick%C3%A9_Foothills "Orlické Foothills") (a strip from northeast to southeast), [Zábřeh Highlands](/wiki/Z%C3%A1b%C5%99eh_Highlands "Zábřeh Highlands") (east) and [Boskovice Furrow](/w/index.php?title=Boskovice_Furrow&action=edit&redlink=1 "Boskovice Furrow (page does not exist)") (a small part in the southeast). The highest point of the district is the hill Bubnovaný kopec in [Pustá Rybná](/wiki/Pust%C3%A1_Rybn%C3%A1 "Pustá Rybná") with an elevation of 780 m (2,560 ft), the lowest point is the river bed of the Loučná in [Cerekvice nad Loučnou](/wiki/Cerekvice_nad_Lou%C4%8Dnou "Cerekvice nad Loučnou") at 278 m (912 ft).

From the total district area of 1,378.7 km2 (532.3 sq mi), [agricultural land](/wiki/Agricultural_land "Agricultural land") occupies 828.5 km2 (319.9 sq mi), forests occupy 435.4 km2 (168.1 sq mi), and water area occupies 11.5 km2 (4.4 sq mi). Forests cover 31.6% of the district's area.[[1]](#cite_note-area-1)

The district is divided into [drainage basins](/wiki/Drainage_basin "Drainage basin") of the [Elbe](/wiki/Elbe "Elbe") and the [Danube](/wiki/Danube "Danube"). The main rivers in the district are the [Svitava](/wiki/Svitava_(river) "Svitava (river)") (central part of the district), [Svratka](/wiki/Svratka_(river) "Svratka (river)") (southeastern part), [Moravská Sázava](/wiki/Moravsk%C3%A1_S%C3%A1zava "Moravská Sázava") (briefly in the northeastern part), [Třebůvka](/wiki/T%C5%99eb%C5%AFvka "Třebůvka") (eastern part), Třebovka and [Loučná](/wiki/Lou%C4%8Dn%C3%A1_(river) "Loučná (river)") (both in the northwestern part). The first four rivers comprise part of the Danube basin, while the latter two comprise part of the Elbe basin. The largest body of water in the district is the fishpond Hvězda with an area of 82 ha (200 acres).[[3]](#cite_note-3)

The [protected landscape area](/wiki/Protected_areas_of_the_Czech_Republic "Protected areas of the Czech Republic") of [Žďárské vrchy](/wiki/%C5%BD%C4%8F%C3%A1rsk%C3%A9_vrchy "Žďárské vrchy") extends into the district in the west.

## Transport

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Svitavy_District&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Transport")]

There are no motorways passing through the district. The most important road is the I/35 road (part of the [European route E442](/wiki/European_route_E442 "European route E442")), which replaces the unfinished section of the [D35 motorway](/wiki/D35_motorway_(Czech_Republic) "D35 motorway (Czech Republic)") from [Olomouc](/wiki/Olomouc "Olomouc") to the [Hradec Králové Region](/wiki/Hradec_Kr%C3%A1lov%C3%A9_Region "Hradec Králové Region").

## Sights

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Svitavy_District&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Sights")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/06/Litomy%C5%A1l_%28Leitomischl%29_chateau_-_by_Pudelek.jpg/250px-Litomy%C5%A1l_%28Leitomischl%29_chateau_-_by_Pudelek.jpg)](/wiki/File:Litomy%C5%A1l_(Leitomischl)_chateau_-_by_Pudelek.jpg)

Litomyšl Castle

The [Litomyšl Castle](/wiki/Litomy%C5%A1l_Castle "Litomyšl Castle") was designated a [UNESCO](/wiki/UNESCO "UNESCO") [World Heritage Site](/wiki/World_Heritage_Site "World Heritage Site") in 1999 because it is an outstanding example of an arcaded Renaissance residence with Baroque elements.[[7]](#cite_note-7)

The most important monuments in the district, protected as [national cultural monuments](/wiki/Cultural_monument_(Czech_Republic) "Cultural monument (Czech Republic)"), are:[[8]](#cite_note-8)

* Litomyšl Castle
* Town hall in Polička
* Church of Saint James the Great with the birthplace of [Bohuslav Martinů](/wiki/Bohuslav_Martin%C5%AF "Bohuslav Martinů") in Polička
* Homestead No. 16 in [Telecí](/wiki/Telec%C3%AD "Telecí")
* Homestead No. 171 in [Čistá](/wiki/%C4%8Cist%C3%A1_(Svitavy_District) "Čistá (Svitavy District)")
* Pilgrimage area with the Church of the Exaltation of the Holy Cross on Kalvárie Hill in [Jaroměřice](/wiki/Jarom%C4%9B%C5%99ice "Jaroměřice")

The best-preserved settlements, protected as [monument reservations](/wiki/Cultural_monument_(Czech_Republic)#Monument_reservations "Cultural monument (Czech Republic)") and [monument zones](/wiki/Cultural_monument_(Czech_Republic)#Monument_zones "Cultural monument (Czech Republic)"), are:[[9]](#cite_note-9)

* [Litomyšl](/wiki/Litomy%C5%A1l "Litomyšl") (monument reservation)
* [Moravská Třebová](/wiki/Moravsk%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1 "Moravská Třebová") (monument reservation)
* [Bystré](/wiki/Bystr%C3%A9_(Svitavy_District) "Bystré (Svitavy District)")
* [Jevíčko](/wiki/Jev%C3%AD%C4%8Dko "Jevíčko")
* [Polička](/wiki/Poli%C4%8Dka "Polička")
* [Svitavy](/wiki/Svitavy "Svitavy")
* [Telecí](/wiki/Telec%C3%AD "Telecí")

The most visited tourist destination is the [Svojanov](/wiki/Svojanov "Svojanov") Castle.[[10]](#cite_note-10)
